name: rc5_two_witnesses
drl:
rule NE when exists E0() P() then end
rule CH salience -10 when $t : Trig() $w : E0(tag=="z") then delete($w); insert(new E0(21, "y")); delete($t); end
_finding: CLASS 3 rule-driven variant — DEFERRED (the EXTERNAL churn is PORTED, D-138; this re-entrant RHS variant is NOT). A rule RHS `delete($w); insert(new witness)` churns the exists EVENT witness DURING its own fire; Drools re-fires (NE,CH,NE) but the engine does not (NE,CH). The D-138 delete-time eval (delete_fact force-evaluates the affected exists rule) does NOT fire re-entrantly during an in-progress fire, so the RHS delete still defers to fire_all (ins-before-del ⇒ coalesce). Needs a re-entrant-safe delete-time eval; not fuzz-reachable (the fuzz generates no witness-deleting rules). open_divergence.
